package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// scenario for s3_getobject_without_range: `s3.GetObject` downloading full objects when only partial data is needed (inferred from subsequent `io.LimitReader` or partial reads)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario428Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	_ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	return http.Get(url)
}
